about.title: About AI-OS
about.subtitle: AI Overall Solutions — Engineered by Anuj.
about.para1: AI-OS stands for Artificial Intelligence Overall Solutions. It is a practical AI execution operating system designed to help users accomplish real-world goals using the best AI tools available.
about.para2: Whether you want to generate creative videos, build applications, draft code, or automate complex business workflows, AI-OS dynamically compiles optimized workflow roadmaps, provides single universal master prompts, and recommends world-class tool chains. There are no course syllabus plans, theory chapters, or certification checkpoints here—only pure, step-by-step execution guides to help you achieve your objective.

quickStartCard.title: ⚡ Quick Start
quickStartCard.subtitle: Complete your task in just 3 simple steps.
quickStartCard.step1Desc: Enter details of what you want to create.
quickStartCard.step1Placeholder: Describe your idea (e.g. futuristic cyberpunk city)...
quickStartCard.step3Desc: Open the recommended AI tool and paste the JSON.

Design and Prototype Hardware.reason: Excellent for industrial design concepts, PCB visualization, product ideation and hardware renders.
Design and Prototype Hardware.quick_guide: Describe your hardware idea in ChatGPT to generate a JSON prompt, then use that prompt in Flux AI to visualize your concept.

Generate a Complete AI Video.reason: Best for cinematic AI video generation with prompt-based workflows.
Generate a Complete AI Video.quick_guide: Generate a JSON prompt using ChatGPT and paste it into Flow AI for professional video generation.

Generate Professional AI Images.reason: Supports high-quality image generation with structured prompts.
Generate Professional AI Images.quick_guide: Use ChatGPT to create a JSON prompt and generate images directly in Flow AI.

Create Digital Designs Using AI.reason: Best for presentations, social media posts, banners, posters and marketing creatives.
Create Digital Designs Using AI.quick_guide: Generate a design prompt and create editable graphics inside Canva AI.

Build Software Using AI.reason: Agentic coding environment capable of building complete applications.
quick_guide: Download the desktop version for Windows/macOS/Linux.
Allow the agent to generate and edit the project.

Build Android Application.reason: Official Android development environment from Google.
quick_guide: Download Android Studio from the official website.
Open or create a new project.
Use the generated prompt with your preferred AI coding assistant.

Monetize AI Skills.title: How to Earn Money Using AI
Monetize AI Skills.reason: One of the largest marketplaces for selling AI services and digital work.

steps.title: Step 1 - Create Fiverr Account
steps.description: Fiverr profile creation, professional username, profile image, bio and skill setup.

steps.title: Step 2 - Create Your First Gig
steps.description: gig title, thumbnail, pricing, description and delivery time.

steps.title: Step 3 - AI Services You Can Sell
steps.description: Here are the top AI services you can offer:

steps.title: Step 4 - Get First Client
steps.description: portfolio building, gig optimization, keywords, response time and reviews.

steps.title: Step 5 - Scale Income
steps.description: multiple gigs, upsells and repeat clients.

Create Music Using AI.quick_guide: Generate a natural English prompt and create complete songs with lyrics and vocals in Suno AI.

steps.title: Open ElevenLabs
steps.description: Visit the official ElevenLabs website to access the AI voice synthesis dashboard.

steps.title: Sign In / Create Account
steps.description: Create a free account or log in to save your voice settings and generations.

steps.title: Access Text to Speech
steps.description: Navigate to the main speech synthesis interface where you input your scripts.

steps.title: Select a Voice
steps.description: Browse the extensive voice library and select a voice profile suited for your content.

steps.title: Adjust Voice Settings
steps.description: Fine-tune stability, clarity, and style exaggeration parameters to customize the voice tone.

steps.title: Input Your Script
steps.description: Paste or type your written script into the text area, checking for correct punctuation.

steps.title: Generate Speech
steps.description: Click the generate button and wait for the AI to synthesize your text into natural audio.

steps.title: Preview Audio
steps.description: Listen to the generated voice-over to ensure correct pronunciation, pacing, and tone.

steps.title: Download File
steps.description: Export and download the generated MP3 or WAV audio file for use in your projects.

Build a Brand Using AI.reason: Google Labs brand creation platform that learns your Business DNA.

steps.title: Open Pomelli
steps.description: Navigate to the Pomelli tool by Google Labs to kickstart your branding journey.

steps.title: Provide Core Business Assets
steps.description: Upload your existing website link, logos, or initial text descriptions to serve as source material.

steps.title: Analyze Brand Identity
steps.description: Allow Pomelli to analyze and learn your brand's unique colors, fonts, imagery, and voice tone.

steps.title: Generate Business DNA
steps.description: Receive a comprehensive Business DNA profile outlining your brand guidelines, mission, and value proposition.

steps.title: Create Marketing Campaigns
steps.description: Generate targeted marketing strategies and campaign drafts customized for your specific audience.

steps.title: Create Brand Book
steps.description: Generate and review your cohesive brand book containing all visual guidelines and copy styling.

steps.title: Draft Landing Page
steps.description: Generate a web layout draft and copy suggestions that align with your new brand guidelines.

steps.title: Export Brand Assets
steps.description: Fine-tune the generated visual elements, logo options, and copy, and export them in high resolution.

Build a Personal AI Assistant.reason: Supports autonomous multi-agent development and local execution.
quick_guide: Download Antigravity desktop from the official website.
Paste the generated AI assistant prompt.
Allow the agent to create, test and refine the assistant automatically.

Study Using AI.reason: Google's source-grounded research assistant that generates summaries, audio overviews, and study guides.

steps.title: Open NotebookLM
steps.description: Visit Google's NotebookLM interface and log in with your account.

steps.title: Create a Notebook
steps.description: Start a new project space to organize all your study sources for a specific subject.

steps.title: Upload Study Materials
steps.description: Add your textbooks, PDF documents, lecture slides, or personal study notes as sources.

steps.title: Index Sources
steps.description: Wait for NotebookLM to analyze and understand all your uploaded documents.

steps.title: Query Sources
steps.description: Ask specific questions in natural language and receive answers grounded strictly in your uploaded materials.

steps.title: Generate Summaries
steps.description: Get auto-generated, concise summaries of long chapters or complex topics.

steps.title: Generate Study Guides
steps.description: Create tailored study guides, glossaries, timelines, and FAQs to test your knowledge.

steps.title: Create Revision Notes
steps.description: Compile key takeaways and customized revision cards directly from your sources.

steps.title: Listen to Audio Overviews
steps.description: Generate and listen to a dynamic two-host podcast conversation summarizing your materials.

Crack Interview Using AI.reason: Interactive real-time voice mode in Google Gemini app, perfect for realistic mock interviews.

steps.title: Open Gemini Mobile App
steps.description: Launch the official Google Gemini app on your Android or iOS device.

steps.title: Start Gemini Live
steps.description: Tap the Live icon in the bottom-right corner to initiate the real-time voice mode.

steps.title: Select Voice Profile
steps.description: Choose a conversational voice style that you find professional and easy to understand.

steps.title: Set the Context
steps.description: Explain your target job role, company name, industry, and experience level to the AI.

steps.title: Prompt Mock Interview
steps.description: Instruct the AI: 'Please conduct a mock interview for this role. Ask one question at a time and wait for my response.'

steps.title: Answer via Voice
steps.description: Respond aloud naturally, practice clear articulation, and pause to think when needed.

steps.title: Get Instant Feedback
steps.description: At the end of the session, ask the AI to evaluate your answers, highlight gaps, and suggest better phrasing.

steps.title: Repeat Practice Rounds
steps.description: Conduct multiple rounds covering behavioral, technical, and scenario-based questions.

steps.title: Refine Communication
steps.description: Observe and work on your voice tone, pacing, confidence, and structure of answers.
